consistency.level_progression: The initial level (10th) and subsequent increase (18th) align with standard D&D 5e feature scaling.

quality.clarity: The description is clear and concise regarding the effect (immunity to being frightened) and scope (self and allies within range).
quality.completeness: Fully describes the initial effect and the later enhancement (range increase at 18th level).

mechanics.effect: Grants immunity to the Frightened condition to self and allies within range.
mechanics.interaction: This is a strong defensive ability, synergizing well with Paladin front-line roles. The dependency on the Paladin remaining conscious is a key balancing factor.
